## Checklist
- [ ] I have pulled the latest `main` and resolved any conflicts
- [ ] I ran formatting/linting locally (or CI will run it)
  - [ ] `ruff check .`
  - [ ] `ruff format .` (or `ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] I ran tests locally (or CI will run it)
  - [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] I added/updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I updated documentation/README if needed
- [ ] This PR is reasonably sized and focused (or I explained why it’s large)
- [ ] All conversations are resolved (required before merge)
- [ ] At least one team member review is required before merge (CODEOWNERS/ruleset)
